overview.description: The Nuveen High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (NHYB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks an index comprised of US dollar corporate bonds rated BB to B, capping issuer exposure and updating monthly to reflect changes across the high-yield market. NHYB was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: ICE BofA BB-B US Cash Pay High Yield Constrained Index
